title: tqdm progress bar patch is dead code behind a triple-quoted string
body: main.py has `from .progress import patch_tqdm` and the call to it wrapped in a plain `""" ... """` string literal (effectively commented out) with a FIXME about rendering issues in multi-threaded huggingface_hub downloads. Right now this just means no progress bar patch is ever applied -- was this meant to be re-enabled once the underlying rendering bug was fixed?

title: KL divergence prompt sample size is fixed at 100
body: KLDivergence's default Settings hardcode `split="test[:100]"` against mlabonne/harmless_alpaca. For larger models where we want a more statistically stable KL estimate, could the number of evaluation prompts be exposed as a config option instead of requiring a code change?

title: How do I write a custom scorer plugin?
body: I can see KLDivergence implementing Scorer with init()/get_score()/get_baseline_score(), but scorer.py and plugin.py don't have a walkthrough of what Context provides beyond load_prompts/get_logits, or how a custom scorer gets registered so heretic actually picks it up during ablation.

title: UTF-8 stream reconfigure doesn't fix mojibake on some Windows terminals
body: main.py reconfigures sys.stdout/stderr to UTF-8 only when `stream.encoding.lower() != 'utf-8'`, but on some Windows terminals (legacy conhost with certain codepages) `encoding` already reports 'utf-8' while the console itself still renders non-ASCII characters as garbage, so this check ends up skipping the fix exactly when it's needed.
